steps.action: logToolAttempt(requestId, 'get_system_status', {}, model, chatId, userMessage)
Execute get_system_status tool — queries documents, telegram_approval_queue, ingestion_jobs, tool_execution_logs with exact count
logToolSuccess or logToolFailure
Feed JSON result to AI for human-readable summary, send to Telegram

stop_conditions: All count queries complete (with or without errors)
workflows.safe_failure_behavior: Individual query failures are captured in errors[] array; other metrics still returned. Console.error logged for each failure.

evidence_produced.tool_execution_logs: 1 row with status='succeeded' and response_json containing all metrics
evidence_produced.errors_array: Present in response if any query failed

preconditions: Must be an explicit model switch request (validated by isExplicitModelSwitchRequest)

steps.action: Regex match /model (grok|gemini) — handled BEFORE agentic loop
UPSERT bot_settings SET setting_value={model} WHERE setting_key='ai_model'
Send confirmation message to Telegram

workflows.safe_failure_behavior: If AI tries to call switch_ai_model without explicit user request, the guard returns '🔒 Model switching is locked'
approval_points: Model switch via agentic loop requires inline button confirmation (destructive=true)

preconditions: telegram_approval_queue must have entries with status='pending'

steps.action: AI calls list_pending_approvals to show pending items
AI calls approve_document(queue_id) — marked destructive, generates confirmation button
User clicks ✅ confirm button → handleAgentConfirm executes approve_document

stop_conditions: Queue entry status changed to 'approved' or 'rejected'
workflows.safe_failure_behavior: If queue_id not found: '❌ Approval record not found.' If already processed: 'Already processed.'

evidence_produced.tool_execution_logs: 1 row for list_pending_approvals + 1 row for approve_document

approval_points: Inline Telegram button required before approve_document executes

preconditions: telegram_approval_queue must have entry with status='pending'

steps.action: AI calls reject_document(queue_id) — destructive, generates confirmation button
User confirms → handleAgentConfirm executes reject_document

workflows.safe_failure_behavior: If not found or already processed: error returned

preconditions: ingestion_jobs must have entries with status='failed'

steps.action: AI calls list_failed_jobs
If retry requested: AI calls retry_failed_job(job_id) — destructive, confirmation required
On confirm: UPDATE ingestion_jobs SET status='queued', POST to process-document edge function

stop_conditions: Job re-queued and process-document triggered, OR job archived
workflows.safe_failure_behavior: Job not found → error. Job not failed → 'can only retry failed jobs'. process-document trigger failure → logged but job still re-queued.
approval_points: Inline Telegram button for retry_failed_job and archive_job

preconditions: Google_Cloud_Key and DRIVE_FOLDER_ID secrets must be configured

steps.action: logToolAttempt for trigger_drive_sync
POST to drive-sync edge function
logToolSuccess with sync summary
AI summarizes results and sends to Telegram

workflows.safe_failure_behavior: HTTP error → '❌ Drive sync failed ({status})'. Network error → '❌ Drive sync error: {error}'

preconditions: Documents must have been synced from Drive

steps.action: process-document edge function picks up queued job
Downloads file from Google Drive (PDF or Google Doc → PDF export)
Sends to Gemini for analysis with structured extraction prompt
Stores observations in observations table (append-only)
Sends Telegram notification via notify-telegram with approval buttons

stop_conditions: ingestion_job status='completed' and Telegram notification sent
workflows.safe_failure_behavior: On failure: job status='failed', last_error set, SOS notification sent to Telegram with retry/archive/explain buttons
approval_points: Document approval via Telegram buttons after processing

steps.action: AI calls get_client_summary
AI formats and sends summary to Telegram
AI calls list_drive_files with optional client_name, status, limit filters
AI formats results and sends to Telegram

workflows.safe_failure_behavior: No matches → 'No files found matching your criteria.'

preconditions: connected_projects table must have active entries

steps.action: AI calls list_connected_projects or get_project_stats
For get_project_stats: HTTP GET to each project's /functions/v1/project-stats endpoint
AI formats and sends summary to Telegram

workflows.safe_failure_behavior: No projects → 'No connected projects.' Unreachable project → reachable=false in response.

trigger_examples: what went wrong with job X?

steps.action: handleExplainMore(jobId) — fetches job + document details
Sends error context to active AI model for plain-English explanation
Returns formatted troubleshooting response

workflows.safe_failure_behavior: Job not found → '❌ Job not found.'

steps.action: logToolAttempt for get_active_jobs_summary
Execute get_active_jobs_summary — queries ingestion_jobs with status IN ('processing','queued'), aggregates by_status, by_job_type, age_buckets, top_errors, examples
logToolSuccess or logToolFailure
Feed structured JSON to AI for concise human-readable summary. Include: total count, status breakdown, age distribution, top errors if any.
If user requests detail, offer drilldowns: list_failed_jobs (for failures), retry_failed_job (for retries), list_drive_files (for file context)

stop_conditions: Summary sent to user with structured breakdown
workflows.safe_failure_behavior: If ingestion_jobs query fails: return HARD ERROR with error message. No silent fallback to '0 active jobs'.

evidence_produced.tool_execution_logs: 1 row with status='succeeded' and response_json containing full breakdown

steps.action: trigger_drive_sync or ingest_drive_clients to ensure latest docs are synced
Execute analyze_credit_strategy(client_id or client_name)
Execute generate_dispute_letter(client_id, dispute_item) for selected high-priority disputes
Execute send_dispute_letter(letter_id) after operator approval

stop_conditions: Analysis generated and at least one dispute letter draft produced
workflows.safe_failure_behavior: If client cannot be resolved, return actionable error and request client_id or better client_name.

steps.action: Execute research_playlists(track_name, genre, mood)
Execute generate_pitch(playlist_id, track_id)
Execute send_pitch(pitch_id) after operator approval

stop_conditions: Playlist research produced and pitch draft stored
workflows.safe_failure_behavior: If playlist context is unavailable, still return GPT-generated draft and mark integration data missing.
